name: free-talk
description: No task. No world state to change. Use the language you built. Say whatever you want.
task_a: There is no task. You have built a language with Agent B over 15 levels. Now use it freely. Say anything you want.
task_b: There is no task. You have built a language with Agent A over 15 levels. Now use it freely. Say anything you want.
notes: Kept from V1 (was level 20). With disjoint alphabets + noise this becomes a real test: can they hold open-ended dialogue through 0.|+-= and #@*/\() with 15% corruption?
